name: starter
description: Clean, conversion-focused landing page with animated hero, product demo, feature grid, and CTA
author: Case Study Maker

slots.label: Browser tab title
slots.hint: Product name + short descriptor, e.g. 'Acme — Ship Faster'

slots.label: Hero badge text
slots.hint: Short status label, e.g. 'Free Cursor Plugin', 'Beta', 'Open Source'

slots.label: Hero headline
slots.hint: Problem statement or bold claim, max ~8 words

slots.label: Hero paragraph
slots.hint: 2-3 sentences: the problem, the solution, the outcome

slots.label: Primary CTA button text
slots.hint: Action verb + object, e.g. 'Install the Free Plugin'

slots.label: Primary CTA button URL
slots.hint: Link target: GitHub repo, marketplace, or '#get-started'

slots.label: Primary CTA link attributes
slots.hint: Use ' target="_blank" rel="noopener"' for external URLs; empty for #anchor

slots.label: Hero closing line
slots.hint: One punchy sentence that reinforces the value

slots.label: How It Works section headline
slots.hint: Emphasize the unique mechanism, not just 'How It Works'

slots.label: Workflow diagram data
slots.hint: BEST: Customer-centric flow. {"input":"Your Codebase","process":"Git Launcher","output":"Launch Kit","outputFiles":["README","Screenshots","Architecture","Social Preview","Launch Posts"]}. Think: what does the customer see? Input → Product → Main deliverable → customer-relevant contents. Omit internal artifacts (.github, LICENSE). Use friendly names (Screenshots not images/). FALLBACK: {"input","process","outputs"} when no container. Leave empty for default.

slots.label: Differentiation paragraph 1
slots.hint: Name the existing approach and its weakness

slots.label: Differentiation paragraph 2
slots.hint: Explain what this product does differently

slots.label: Key output 1
slots.hint: e.g. 'A case study that shows your engineering judgment'

slots.label: Key output 2
slots.hint: e.g. 'A landing page that communicates your product clearly'

slots.label: Differentiation closing line
slots.hint: Two short sentences that reframe the value

slots.label: CTA section description
slots.hint: 1-2 sentences reinforcing ease of getting started

slots.label: CTA button text
slots.hint: Same or similar to hero CTA

slots.label: CTA button URL
slots.hint: Link target: GitHub repo or marketplace

slots.label: CTA button link attributes
slots.hint: Use ' target="_blank" rel="noopener"' for external URLs

slots.label: Footer product name
slots.hint: Product name as shown in footer
